text: Tab Crocin 500 1-0-1 after food for fever
Augmentin 625 Duo twice daily x 5 days
Cap Mox 500 tid; Tab Dolo 650 sos
Telma 40 morning for BP, Atorva 10 at night
Ecosprin 75 OD, Warfarin 5mg as per INR
Montair LC at bedtime, Cetzine 10 if itching
Omez 20 empty stomach, Combiflam for pain
Patient advised rest and plenty of fluids
Review after one week with reports
